name: carrick-games
description: Retro game collection by Carrick - HTML5 Canvas games

scripts.test:e2e: pkill -f 'chromium.*carrick-games' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'python3 -m http.server 8080' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; playwright test --exit
scripts.posttest:e2e: pkill -f 'chromium.*carrick-games' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'python3 -m http.server 8080' 2>/dev/null; echo 'Post-test cleanup done'
